# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow the canonical shared workflow in `C:\Development\_shared\website-operating-procedure.md`.

If that path is unavailable, use the repo-local copy in `docs/operating-procedure.md`.

Use branch + pull request for meaningful changes, run lint/build checks before merge, and keep setup/deployment documentation current.

Do not commit secrets, `.env.local`, `dist`, `node_modules`, or local `.codex-*` artifacts.
